api_key.description: Interzoid license key. Sent as the `license` query parameter on every request; never logged.

base_url.description: Interzoid API base URL override for tests or proxies.

company.description: Company name input for the company_name_matching stream (getcompanymatchadvanced). Required to read that stream.

company_match_algorithm.description: Optional matching algorithm override for the company_name_matching stream.

fullname.description: Full name input for the individual_name_matching stream (getfullnamematch). Required to read that stream.

address.description: Street address input for the street_address_matching stream (getaddressmatchadvanced). Required to read that stream.

address_match_algorithm.description: Optional matching algorithm override for the street_address_matching stream.

org.description: Organization name input for the standardize_company_names stream (getorgstandard). Required to read that stream.
